title: Plan and implement a propagation program for medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement a propagation program for medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine propagation requirements for medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Identify and confirm cultivation specifications and requirements with senior personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm cultivation specifications and requirements with senior personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm cultivation specifications and requirements with senior personnel.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine space requirements for the program, including any parameters that impact on propagation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine legal and regulatory considerations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine monitoring and treatment strategies to maintain health of propagation material.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop schedules for propagation activities, including monitoring of propagation material health, water and nutrients requirements and environmental climate conditions.
